reviews.review_description:
the more u trying to made it look like "real"  the more it will fail bcz GO hardware is suit the best with cartoonish graphic like in 'bait' games, it will be soooooo nice if u made the landscape and environment look smooth cartoonish 3d like in 'bait' games, will look more peaceful, and nice to look

*update my stars, pls lemme know if ur 'cartoonish' style games is ready, will gladly pay for it, pls made 'bait' game as ur inspiration and it'll be peacful and perfect

developer_response.body: you are probably right. That is something i learned developing this experience. A cartoonish style would work better and it would be easy to develop. I will consider it for my next experiences. Thanks for the feedback.

reviews.review_description: This is just what I was looking for to go along with our rowing machine. Couple of suggestions, when typing rowing or row in store this didn't appear - found it via Google, might be worth adding? Secondly the free mode is exactly what I was after, but - would it be possible to just add a long repeating stretch of water, no turning - just with a bank or something on either side to get the feeling of speed. There is nothing else on the Go that does this and if you could market/tailor it more to rowing machines I think you'd see an additional amount of sales. Thanks for developing this anyway.

The graphics, controls and realism I found to be really great. I would add options to populate the scenes. For example I thought it would be so cool if a rock climber was waving happily down at me or if fairies were flying around, even pirates with swords wandering about.
I've never tried anything similar but I love the paddle and the reflection off the water!  Decent for $1!  No gaming elements, you just move around one of 3 environments in one of the two boats.

developer_response.body: thanks for comment and glad you like it.

reviews.review_description: Has the potential to be awesome. Please speed up movement. Hide the 'back to menu' text in the Kayak. Add more birds, fish jumping, etc. Very cool experience.

Update: Nice improvements, motion still needs work. Appreciate some of the increased detail for scenery, makes a nice difference. Water texture and reflections are amazing. But still very difficult to control with motion controller. Maybe I'm not using the paddles/oars correctly,  maybe an in-game steering demo would help?
But the background scenery really hurts it.

reviews.review_title: No no no! Ok BUT! POLISH IT BEFORE PLS!
reviews.review_description: Nice idea. But why TF should i point with my Paddle instead of PADDLE with my Paddle? And the Rocks are Off Scale. They  are cut a Meter above see level. And seem so wrong in their appearance. Just Work in it and make it right!

developer_response.body: Updated,  experimental paddling support added. Hope you like it, although it's not perfect. Thanks again for the feedback.

reviews.review_description:
But I would give 5 stars if the boat could also turn with the turning of my head. In this way I could try to use the vr visor while exercising with my rowing machine (where I can't use my hand to move the controller)
[Edit] now the app has been implemented with the head control of the boat, now is perfect to practise indoor rowing. It's so nice to practise indoor rowing in beatiful fjord being surrounded by waterfallls, high cliffs and beatiful landscapes listening at the sounds of the water. I recommend to anyone who wants to practise indoor rowing without getting bored... Good job

developer_response.body: thanks for the updated review and the five stars, i really apreciate it. Hope you have fun!

reviews.review_description: As a paddleboarder really enjoyed this .would be nice to see some fish in the water .the reflections of the trees in the water looked more like they were flashing from a distance .the water effects look really good
A relaxing game with nice visuals and control.

This is well worth the money.
I hope they expand this app, its excellent. So very relaxing just floating around in a kayak, the seagulls, the lapping water. Graphics are really good. This app has great potential.
Well done.

developer_response.body: Glad you like it. Thanks for the feedback.

reviews.review_description: This should be on the Quest where you have to balance and use two hands. Nice water effects.

This app has stimulated me to get back to the rowing machine. But please make the free mode to take a fixed path. I always end on some rock and must stop to find the controller!
Look great, love the app!

There really isn't much to complain about, due to hardware limitations. It's relaxing and there are different controls which can be a little confusing at first but it's not bad. Personally, it'd be nice to see bob effects though, or maybe just have an option for it (for those who might have motion sickness, probably not have it on). Maybe add a fog feature, making it feel less restrictive on distance. Another suggestion, as stated in another review, maybe add fish or silhouettes of fish. I know those are most likely not going to be implemented but I think they'd be nice additions to an already good game but they're just suggestions anyways. Good game though.
